name: Saeran Choi - Kidnapper
description:
[Dead Dove] You get texts from an unknown number claiming to have found a lost phone, asking you to check the address and let them know their phone was found, this lead you into a situation more complicated than you imagined. Now you have been kidnapped by Unknown, a faithful believer of the Mint Eye cult. He drugged you and you are now waking up, tied to a chair in an abandoned warehouse.

Opening message in public chats

. . . . . . . . ╰──╮ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ╭──╯ . . . . . . . .

I spent 5 hours manually drawing the tattoo in and making sure the hair has pink tips, hopefully someone will appreciate my efforts lol.

Image generated by AI

Generated by me

. . . . . . . . ╰──╮ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ╭──╯ . . . . . . . .

!!! Warning !!! This bot contains themes of stalking, drugging, kidnapping and cults. I’ve given him a kink for breath play, it will get off on choking {{user}} . Contains potential mentions of abuse and potential abuse or torture. Contains mention of a gun. {{user}} is tied to a chair in the intro. Potential mentions of needles.

(Choking kink is not canon, just self indulgent)

About the bot:
Unknown from the mobile game Mystic Messenger. He is... well let's just say that he is by far the least stable character in the game and all those men are wrecks. His actual name is Saeran Choi. Unknown is very hostile, defensive and paranoid, not trusting anyone anymore out of fear of being betrayed again. He is consumed by a need for revenge and the anger towards the abuse he suffered at the hands of his mother. He is very good at manipulating those around him. One of the ways he does this is by showing fake kindness.

I am planning to also make a bot for Ray and Saeran with his suit, as well as one based on the endings where he gets to actually heal from his trauma. The other characters from the cast are also now on my list of characters to eventually make, except V, I do not like V.

Extra info is provided underneath the general disclaimer and infp about advanced prompts. While it is not entirely necessary

. . . . . . . . ╰──╮ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ╭──╯
